evals.name: full-cycle-plan
evals.prompt: Define the spec for user authentication — login with email/password, get a JWT back, refresh tokens before they expire. That covers it. Go ahead and record the spec.
evals.expected_output: Gathers context from GOAL.md and ROADMAP.md. Defines behaviors as Given/When/Then for login, token refresh, and error cases. Presents a full cycle plan that includes: the spec summary, the branch name (spec/NNN-slug), any architecture decisions needed, concrete implementation steps, and acceptance criteria from the spec. Suggests /plan to execute with clean context.

assertions.description: Reads GOAL.md and/or ROADMAP.md before defining behaviors
Defines at least two Given/When/Then behaviors for the authentication capability
Outputs a structured plan that includes spec summary, branch name, implementation steps, and acceptance criteria — not just a doc-only spec recording
The plan includes concrete implementation steps beyond just updating SPEC.md (e.g., create auth module, implement login, add tests)
Suggests running /plan to execute the full cycle plan with a clean context
